prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第120名，近年排名稳定在116–122名区间，属于中后段211；2021–2026年声誉数据中无东北农业大学显著声誉事件，评价中性；抖音热度总排名第95位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度平稳；食品科学与工程为A-学科（第五轮学科评估），是该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，但该校相关专业录取位次远高于校线；食品科学与工程类热度平稳；山西省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），竞争略有缓解；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，在山西省招生占比约1.3%–2.0%，属跨省招生；山西考生对东北地区高校报考意愿一般，无明显地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考改革后位次大幅后移的基准、2026年物理类考生减少约3.4%带来的竞争缓解、招生计划小幅扩招3.2%以及学校声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移（更易进）；预测最低位次约42489名，区间41989–42989名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 22331 → 28928 → 28176 → 25430 → 41878. In 2025, due to Shanxi Province's first year of the new college entrance examination (batch merger into undergraduate batch), the ranking dropped significantly by about 16448 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 41878. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plans were 95 in 2021, 95 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 62 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 64, a slight expansion of 2 students (+3.2%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 120th, with recent rankings stable in the 116–122 range, placing it in the mid-to-late segment of 211 universities. From 2021 to 2026, there were no significant reputation events for Northeast Agricultural University, with a neutral evaluation. Its Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 95th overall, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure and stable application attention. Food Science and Engineering is an A- discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering major in the enrollment plan, offering some appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, but the admission rankings for related majors at this university are far above the school line. The popularity of Food Science and Engineering is stable. In 2026, Shanxi Province has 167,419 physics category examinees, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, with an enrollment share in Shanxi of about 1.3%–2.0%, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Shanxi examinees generally have average willingness to apply to universities in Northeast China, with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking drop after the 2025 new college entrance examination reform, the easing of competition due to a 3.4% decrease in physics category examinees in 2026, a slight 3.2% expansion in enrollment plans, and stable school reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly improve (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 42489, with a range of 41989–42989.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Data Science and Big Data Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Food Science and Engineering
- Veterinary Medicine
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Agricultural Mechanization and Automation)
- Statistics
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Plant Production (Agronomy, Seed Science and Engineering)
- Animal Production (Animal Science, Grassland Science, Aquaculture)
- Natural Conservation and Environmental Ecology
- Business Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 41989–42989, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction. Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) can be attempted as reach schools, but their admission rankings are usually far above the school line. Tier 3 majors serve as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<41989), you can focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors. Food Science and Engineering, as the university's A- flagship discipline, offers outstanding cost-effectiveness and is recommended for priority consideration.
